name: cardex
description: CarDex — a Pokédex for the cars you spot in the wild (Expo + TypeScript)

comments.versions: Expo SDK 54 (React 19.1 / RN 0.81). Native-module versions taken from Expo's SDK 54 bundledNativeModules map. Run `npm install` then `npx expo install --fix` to confirm alignment.
comments.reanimated4: Reanimated 4 requires the New Architecture (newArchEnabled is set in app.json) and the separate react-native-worklets package. The Babel plugin is now react-native-worklets/plugin (see babel.config.js).
comments.vision-camera: Not tracked by Expo's map — pinned to a current v4. Run `npx expo install react-native-vision-camera` to let Expo pick/confirm the version, and verify it supports RN 0.81 + New Architecture.
